home.heroDesc: Complete automation, sales optimization, and guaranteed compliance — from the counter to strategic management.
home.capabilitiesDesc: A comprehensive platform designed for modern pharmacies, with field-tested tools.
home.capInventoryDesc: Products, movements, expiry dates, reorder suggestions — fewer stockouts.
home.capPatientsDesc: Patient records, prescriptions, vaccination for structured healthcare.
home.capPOSDesc: Modern POS, invoicing, and payment methods tailored to your market.
home.capAnalyticsDesc: Dashboards, reports, and BI to optimize margins, volumes, and teams.
home.capComplianceDesc: Quality, business journal, and traceability to pass inspections.
home.capSupplyChainDesc: Purchase requests, orders, receipts, and supplier tracking in one workflow.
home.bentoPOSDesc: Intuitive interface designed for speed. Manage queues effortlessly.
home.bentoAnalyticsDesc: Predict your stock needs and identify your most profitable products.
home.bentoComplianceDesc: Automated tax reports and complete traceability of controlled substances.
home.bentoPatientsDesc: Track medical history, manage recurring prescriptions, and send automatic reminders.
home.ctaDesc: Join over 500 pharmacies that trust SyntixPharma to optimize their daily operations.
home.modulesPreviewDesc: A preview of the most-used building blocks - the full list details every business capability.
home.aiSpotlightTitle: An assistant that helps your team
home.aiSpotlightDesc: Reduce errors, automate workflows, and turn data into concrete actions, with full traceability.
home.aiSpotlightCard1Desc: Context-aware answers and action suggestions, with approval before execution.
home.aiSpotlightCard2Desc: Anticipate demand, size inventory, and reduce stockouts.
home.aiSpotlightCard3Desc: Detect at-risk batches and take action to reduce losses.
home.aiSpotlightCard4Desc: All initiated actions are traceable for checks and investigations.

about.title: Revolutionizing
about.desc: SyntixPharma was born from a simple vision: give pharmacists the tools needed to deliver better care, everywhere and at all times.
about.quote: Our mission is to remove barriers and elevate the quality of care.
about.missionDesc: We build the infrastructure that enables African pharmacies to compete with the highest international standards.
about.missionText: Make pharmacy operations accessible to every pharmacist in Africa, regardless of their level or location.
about.visionText: A continent where every patient benefits from digitized, traceable, world-class pharmaceutical services.
about.timeline2021Desc: First beta version deployed in Kinshasa with 10 pilot pharmacies.
about.timeline2022Desc: Expansion to Lubumbashi and Goma. 100+ active pharmacies.
about.timeline2023Desc: Deployment in Burundi and Congo-Brazzaville. Launch of predictive AI.
about.timeline2024Desc: 500+ pharmacies. Partnerships with major national distributors.
about.valueEmpathyDesc: We put people at the heart of every line of code.
about.valueIntegrityDesc: Data security and privacy are our absolute priorities.
about.valueExcellenceDesc: We aim for perfection in user experience and support.
about.valueCollaborationDesc: We grow with our clients by listening to their real needs.
about.teamCtaDesc: We recruit talent passionate about HealthTech and social impact in Africa.

t1.title: Welcome to SyntixPharma - introduction
t1.content: Hello everyone! I'm glad to join this community. I run a pharmacy in Kinshasa and I've been testing SyntixPharma for a few weeks. Very impressed by the features! Who else uses this software?

t2.title: 5 tips to manage inventory
t2.content:
Here are 5 tips I use every day:
1. Do inventory every morning
2. Use expiry alerts
3. Scan products on arrival
4. Check batch numbers
5. Train your team

t3.title: Mobile app integration
t3.content: The mobile app works very well! I integrated it with our billing system. Small downside: synchronization can sometimes be slow. Otherwise great!

t4.title: Request: PDF export
t4.content: Would it be possible to have a PDF export for sales reports? It would be very useful for my monthly meetings. Thanks!

t5.title: POS bug
t5.content: I noticed a bug when printing receipts. The total sometimes shows an extra decimal. Has anyone else seen this issue?

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
s1.content: By accessing SyntixPharma, you agree to be bound by these terms of use. If you do not accept all of these terms, you must not use our services.

s2.title: 2. Service description
s2.content: SyntixPharma is a SaaS pharmacy management platform offering POS, inventory management, patient tracking, supply chain, accounting and analytics features. The service is provided as is and is accessible via web browser.

s3.title: 3. User accounts
s3.content: You are responsible for the confidentiality of your login credentials and all activities carried out under your account. You must notify us immediately in case of unauthorized use of your account.

s4.title: 4. Data protection
s4.content: Health data is processed in accordance with applicable regulations. We use AES-256 encryption and daily backups. Data remains the exclusive property of the customer.

s5.title: 5. Subscriptions and payments
s5.content: Subscriptions are billed monthly or yearly depending on the selected plan. Prices are in US dollars (USD). In case of non-payment, service access may be suspended after notice.

s6.title: 6. Termination
s6.content: You may cancel your subscription at any time from your dashboard. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. Your data remains available for 30 days after cancellation.

s7.title: 7. Limitation of liability
s7.content: SyntixPharma shall not be liable for indirect, incidental or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use the service. Our total liability is limited to the amount paid by the customer over the last 12 months.

s8.title: 8. Changes
s8.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on this page.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: At SyntixPharma, protecting your data and your patients' data is our top priority. We are committed to full transparency about how we collect, use and protect your information.

s1.title: 1. Data collected
s1.content: We collect data required to provide our services: account information (name, email, phone), usage data (logs, preferences), and business data (inventory, sales, patients) entered by you.

s2.title: 2. Use of data
s2.content: Your data is used exclusively to provide, improve and secure our services. We never use your patients' health data for advertising or marketing purposes.

s3.title: 3. Storage and security
s3.content: Data is hosted on secure servers with AES-256 encryption at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit. Automatic backups are performed hourly. Data access is strictly role-based.

s4.title: 4. Data sharing
s4.content: We never sell your data. Sharing is limited to technical providers required to operate the service (hosting, payments) and legal obligations.

s5.title: 5. Your rights
s5.content: You have the right to access, correct, port and delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at {email}.

s6.title: 6. Cookies
s6.content: We use cookies strictly necessary for service operation (session, preferences). No advertising tracking cookies are used.

s7.title: 7. Retention
s7.content: Account data is kept for the subscription duration plus 30 days. Anonymized usage data may be retained for statistical purposes.

s8.title: 8. Contact
s8.content: For any question related to data protection, contact our Data Protection Officer: {email}

marketing.trustedBy: Trusted by pharmacies across the continent
marketing.testimonialsDesc: Join a community of pharmacists modernizing healthcare.
marketing.testimonial1Content: SyntixPharma has transformed my daily management. I can finally track my inventory remotely and my sales have increased by 20% in 6 months.
marketing.testimonial2Content: The interface is so simple that my employees learned it in one morning. Technical support is always there when needed.
marketing.testimonial3Content: Regulatory compliance was a nightmare before SyntixPharma. Now, everything is automated and secure. I highly recommend it.
marketing.faqDesc: Everything you need to know to get started with confidence.
marketing.faq1A: Yes! SyntixPharma has a full offline mode. You can continue to make sales and manage your inventory. Data will be automatically synced when the connection is restored.
marketing.faq2A: Absolutely. We use bank-level encryption (AES-256) and our servers comply with international health standards. Your data is backed up daily.
marketing.faq3A: Registration takes less than 2 minutes. Importing your inventory can take between 30 minutes and a few hours depending on inventory size. Our team can assist you for free.
marketing.faq4Q: Can I use my own hardware?
marketing.faq4A: Yes, SyntixPharma is compatible with most standard barcode scanners, thermal printers, and cash drawers on the market.
marketing.authShellTestimonial: SyntixPharma has transformed the way we manage our pharmacy. It has become our team's essential tool.
